subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the Love of God! Thou art a beloved daughter in the Kingdom of Abha
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعله بنار محبت الله در ملکوت ابهی دختر عزیزی و در نزد عبدالبهاء محترم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
